news.title: Sebi weighs introducing long-term futures and options contracts: Tuhin Kanta Pandey
news.description: Sebi is evaluating longer-term futures and options contracts, broader commodity derivatives and bond index derivatives to deepen markets. The regulator highlighted resilient capital markets, strong domestic investor participation and a robust IPO pipeline despite global uncertainties and volatility.
